release_notes: Hardened the WebUI against XSS, fixed logout/reconnect lifecycle issues, and tightened memory_search validation with Python 3.14-compatible async tests.

changes.note: Added the v0.1.8 release notes entry.
Updated the release banner and WebUI release summary for v0.1.8.
Validated top_k at runtime to reject zero or negative values.
Converted memory_search integration coverage to async tests compatible with Python 3.14.
Escaped raw HTML in Markdown rendering and added safe DOM helpers for attachments/icons.
Stopped reconnect loops after logout or auth expiry and reject pending requests on disconnect.
Made socket bootstrap idempotent and reused safe attachment rendering helpers.
Rebuilt file browser rows, breadcrumb, and staging UI with safe DOM APIs.
Made automation/onboarding setup idempotent and sanitized shared dialog messaging.
